hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi
hooks._comment: CUSTOMIZE: Change the file extension pattern and lint command for your stack. Examples: '.py$' with 'flake8', '.go$' with 'golangci-lint', '.rb$' with 'rubocop'

hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'src/generated/|dist/|build/|__pycache__/'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit generated or build output files directly.' >&2; exit 2; fi
hooks._comment: CUSTOMIZE: Add any folders that should never be manually edited (generated code, build output, etc.)

hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.env$|\.env\.production$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit .env files directly. Check .env.example for reference.' >&2; exit 2; fi
hooks._comment: CUSTOMIZE: Add any sensitive files that should never be edited by Claude

hooks.command: echo 'Context restored. Key reminders: (1) [PACKAGE_MANAGER] is the package manager for this project. (2) [KEY_CONVENTION_1]. (3) [KEY_CONVENTION_2]. (4) Never edit generated files — run the codegen command instead.'
hooks._comment: CUSTOMIZE: Replace placeholders with your project's key reminders. These show up when Claude's context is compacted during long sessions.

hooks.command: powershell.exe -Command "[System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadWithPartialName('System.Windows.Forms'); [System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox]::Show('Claude Code needs your attention', 'Claude Code')"
hooks._comment: Windows desktop notification. On Mac/Linux replace with: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention"' or notify-send 'Claude Code needs your attention'
